primary_metric: task-level pass-rate difference for current skills minus no skills across four distinct MoonBit language behavior and API boundary tasks
stopping_rule: Run exactly eight source-only cells after all 19 grader-contract cases pass. Do not replace tasks after seeing results. Repeat only a task whose current-skill cell fails, under the repository allocation policy. If two DeepSeek Pro requests emit no model event within the operational wait window, stop them and use the separately frozen Kimi fallback matrix.
